svg.text: Similarity Center is C - ratio is k and angle A To draw M' image of M in similarity : - we draw m image of M in rotation with center in C and angle A - we transform m in uniform scale with center in C and k as ratio For our example angle is 30 degrees and k is 0.75 Similarity preserve angle of shape and orientation To retrieve M from M', we use similarity with center in C, angle is - A and ratio 1 / k To composite two similarities with same center, we add angles and multiply ratios If centers are not in same point, as for rotations we can retrieve center of composite by construction or with matrix, finding the invariant point
